Class ImageCache

java.lang.Object
gui.card.ImageCache
public final class ImageCache extends Object
A high-quality image cache for the application.

Images are loaded once at their original resolution and reused throughout the UI. JavaFX GPU handles the scaling so thumbnails remain sharp without using extra memory.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image get(String resourcePath)
      Retrieves an image from the cache or loads it if it doesn't exist. All UI elements reuse the same Image object to optimize memory.
      Parameters:
      resourcePath - The relative path to the image resource.
      Returns:
      The cached Image object, or null if the resource is not found.

    • cardPath

      public static String cardPath(String type, String name)

      public static String objectivePath(String name)

      public static String itemPath(String name)

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears all cached images to free up memory.
